name: 39_Drug_Response_Prediction_SVM_GDSC_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kutabiri mwitikio wa dawa ukitumia seti ya data ya GDSC na regressor ya Support Vector Machine (SVM). Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza regressor ya SVM katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini utendaji wa mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utendaji katika `results/metrics/performance.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya regression ukitumia seaborn na uhifadhi chini ya `results/figures/`. Kisha, tengeneza ripoti ikijumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`. Ripoti inapaswa kusisitiza jinsi uteuzi wa vipengele unavyoathiri utendaji wa mfano, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression unapaswa kuonyesha wazi uhusiano kati ya vipengele vilivyochaguliwa na mwitikio wa dawa uliotabiriwa. Hakikisha mfumo umeundwa kuwa rahisi kupanuliwa kwa kujumuisha seti za data za ziada au vipengele vipya.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya mwitikio wa dawa "GDSC" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya regression yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

Ripoti inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression, inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti inapaswa kusisitiza jinsi uteuzi wa vipengele unavyoathiri utendaji wa mfano.
Uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression unapaswa kuonyesha wazi uhusiano kati ya vipengele vilivyochaguliwa na mwitikio wa dawa uliotabiriwa.
Hakikisha kwamba mfumo unaweza kupanuliwa kwa urahisi ili kujumuisha seti za data za ziada au vipengele vipya bila kazi kubwa ya upya.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya mwitikio wa dawa "GDSC" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The `src/data_loader.py` file contains a function `load_and_select_features` that explicitly loads a GDSC dataset from a provided CSV path (`data_path`). The function uses `pd.read_csv(data_path)` and is designed to handle a target column for drug response prediction. Execution evidence confirms the function ran successfully after resolving syntax and dependency issues, and the results file (`performance.txt`) recorded selected features, confirming the dataset was loaded and processed.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The feature selection requirement is satisfied because `src/data_loader.py` implements a function `load_and_select_features` that uses `SelectKBest` with `f_regression` to identify and return the top `k` most important features from the dataset. The code explicitly performs feature selection (lines 12-17) and returns the selected feature names.

<SATISFIED>
The `src/model.py` file contains a proper implementation of an SVM regressor using `sklearn.svm.SVR` with a linear kernel, wrapped in a pipeline with `StandardScaler`. The environment feedback confirms that after resolving the initial `scikit-learn` installation issue, the model executed successfully during training (Step 17) and produced RMSE results (Step 18), demonstrating a functional SVM regressor.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The `src/train.py` script successfully implements cross-validation for model evaluation. The code explicitly uses `cross_val_score` with `cv=5` to perform 5-fold cross-validation, calculating RMSE scores from the negative mean squared error. Execution evidence confirms the script ran to completion after resolving initial syntax and dependency issues, producing performance metrics (including cross-validated RMSE scores) saved to `results/metrics/performance.txt` and generating a visualization (`rmse_scores.png`) of the cross-validation results.

<UNSATISFIED>
The `performance.txt` file contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates it does not contain the actual performance metrics (such as RMSE scores or feature selection results) that were expected based on the trajectory evidence. The trajectory shows the training script executed successfully and generated a proper output file, but the current file content does not match that description, suggesting the final saved result is incomplete or corrupted.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya regression yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies that regression results should be displayed using "seaborn." However, the trajectory evidence explicitly states that the image was generated using `matplotlib` (instead of `seaborn` as instructed). While the image was successfully saved to `results/figures/rmse_scores.png`, the implementation deviated from the specified library requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression, inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The PDF report `drug_response_prediction_report.pdf` has been successfully created and saved in the `results` directory. The report content, as extracted from the PDF, comprehensively covers the required sections: Data Preprocessing (loading GDSC dataset, feature selection), Model Training (SVM regressor implementation with pipeline), Model Evaluation (5-fold cross-validation, RMSE calculation), and Results (list of selected features, RMSE scores, mean, standard deviation, and a visualization reference). The trajectory evidence confirms the PDF was generated after resolving initial tooling and image path issues, and its presence is verified in the workspace structure.
